'''Noils''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|General]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and the base commander of the [[Kalist VI/Legends|Kalist VI]] garrison.

{{Char-stub}}
